falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (10% above the previous bottom's confirmation level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above this threshold would invalidate the bottom pattern and suggest a bullish reversal, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate excessive bullish momentum, directly contradicting the current bearish pattern match and HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield drops below 3.8% (20% below its 2024-Aug bottom level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a yield decline would indicate capitulation in bonds, invalidating the current pattern's assumptions about market dynamics and proving the HOLD signal incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
